overall.description: Static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing industrial architecture with smokestacks, a prominent red bridge spanning the harbor, and docking facilities under bright midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic industrial harbor with docking platforms

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view captures a futuristic cyberpunk industrial harbor under bright midday sun. The scene is dominated by a prominent red bridge spanning the water, with industrial smokestacks emitting smoke on the right, a dense futuristic skyline in the background, and concrete docking platforms lining the shore. The camera remains completely stationary throughout, providing a cinematic view of the atmospheric urban landscape with no visible movement or activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic panorama of a futuristic industrial harbor bathed in bright midday sunlight. It begins with a wide view of the waterfront, where a prominent red bridge spans the water against a dense cyberpunk skyline. The gaze lingers on the concrete docking platforms lining the shore as industrial smokestacks emit plumes of smoke into the clear sky on the right. The scene remains perfectly still, maintaining a frozen, atmospheric perspective of the urban landscape without any camera movement or activity.
